changes.value:
Every command implementation in swissarmyhammer-kanban/src/commands/ repeats the exact same 3-line pattern to extract KanbanContext:

```rust
let kanban = ctx
    .extension::<KanbanContext>()
    .ok_or_else(|| CommandError::ExecutionFailed("KanbanContext not available".into()))?;
```

This appears 9 times across task_commands.rs, entity_commands.rs, column_commands.rs, and app_commands.rs. Similarly, every UI command repeats the UIState extraction pattern. A helper method on CommandContext (e.g. `ctx.require_extension::<T>()`) or a helper function in the commands module would eliminate this duplication and make the error message consistent.

File: swissarmyhammer-kanban/src/commands/*.rs
W3: Repeated boilerplate for KanbanContext extraction in every command
